svg.text: Admin Mockup 02 · Manajemen Siswa — v3 (sticky filter chips inside hero)
BrandPageHeader + BrandFilterChipStrip · same pattern as parent Nilai / Tagihan / Kehadiran
A · Default state · all filters at default values
"Periode" applied (current AY) · others are dashed placeholders
All chips show their value · all stay sticky inside the hero · tap a chip to edit just that filter
C · Tap "Tingkat" chip → focused picker (BrandHeroSheet single-axis)
Single-dimension picker · same widget as Pilih Sekolah / Pilih Peran · tap any option to apply + auto-dismiss

g.text: Sticky filter pattern · same widget admin/teacher/parent share
Horizontal scrollable. Each chip: label + value
when set, dashed `+ label` when unset.
Tap a chip → opens this sheet for that one filter.
Identical to Pilih Sekolah / Pilih Peran sheets.
Why filters live in the hero (not below it)
Filters scroll up with the hero · user always knows what's applied
Each chip is its own picker · single-axis sheet · no full filter form
Dashed `+ Tingkat` placeholder reveals available filters
Same shape parent uses on Nilai, Tagihan, Kehadiran, Aktivitas
AdminCrudScaffold continues to host the search bar + body + FAB · just swaps its
internal header for BrandPageHeader. The filter button → bottom-sheet flow becomes the chip strip.
